---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for datapitfalls
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. What should datapitfalls do?

## Which audit domain does this relate to?

_Choose the one that fits best (or "Other"):_

- [ ] Epistemic Errors
- [ ] Technical Trespasses
- [ ] Mathematical Miscues
- [ ] Statistical Slip-Ups
- [ ] Analytical Aberrations
- [ ] Graphical Gaffes
- [ ] Design Dangers
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, links, or examples here.

> 💡 If you're proposing a specific new pitfall **detection rule**, please use the
> [New pitfall rule](https://github.com/bjonesdataliteracy/datapitfalls/issues/new?template=new_pitfall_rule.md)
> template instead.
